changes.summary: W-1 canonical shell: shared Birzha source posts list UI (header, publish CTA, SourceBirzhaPostsList, AdaptiveLayout) parameterized by sourceEntityType/id, backPath, and publishHref.

W-2 canonical shell: shared Birzha publish flow (birzha hub lookup, loading/error, sticky header, PublicationCreateForm) with community Obsidian value-tag seeding via futureVisionPublicationId preserved.
Re-export Birzha shells and their prop types from feature barrel.
Thin wrapper delegating to BirzhaSourcePostsShell with community routes.
Thin wrapper delegating to BirzhaSourcePostsShell with project paths.
Thin wrapper delegating to BirzhaPublishShell for community source.
Thin wrapper delegating to BirzhaPublishShell for project source.

notes: Attempt 1 confirms attempt-0 delta; no further write_set edits required. Prior attempt failed only on LLM verifier path (verdict_llm.scratch.yaml missing under non-wt workers dir); tsc/lint/static passed. Route page.tsx files unchanged; hub embeds continue importing route-local *PageClient re-exports.
